BLACKSMITH.title: Blacksmith
BLACKSMITH.pages.INITIAL.description:
You enter a [gold]blacksmith's shop[/gold] filled with heat.
[sine]The furnace roars[/sine] as the [gold]blacksmith[/gold] swings their hammer.
They notice you and pause their work:
"Huh?"
BLACKSMITH.pages.INITIAL.options.FUSE.de: Choose [blue]2[/blue] cards to [jitter]fuse[/jitter] into a higher rarity card.
BLACKSMITH.pages.FUSE_PROMPT.title: Select Cards to Fuse
BLACKSMITH.pages.UPGRADED.description:
The blacksmith skillfully upgrades your cards.
"HUH!"
They wave goodbye.
BLACKSMITH.pages.FUSED.description: The blacksmith throws the two cards into the furnace. Sparks fly, and a brand new card emerges.
BLACKSMITH.pages.CANCELLED.description: You decide to leave the blacksmith's shop.
BLACKSMITH.pages.FUSE_FAILED.description: The fusion failed. The blacksmith shrugs helplessly.
